source_jobs.title: Analyst, Investments
source_jobs.description:
ADI Development Group is a vertically integrated Canadian real estate developer and investment manager based in the Greater Toronto Area. With an established track record across Canadian markets, ADI develops, builds, and manages institutional-quality multi-unit residential communities, with a current focus on affordable rental development at scale. The platform brings development, construction, and property management capabilities together under one roof.

We are seeking an Analyst to join the Investments team in a foundational role supporting underwriting, diligence, and asset management across the firm's acquisition and development activities. Reporting to the VP of Investments, the Analyst will be responsible for building and maintaining financial models, supporting diligence on new opportunities, and contributing to Investment Committee materials. This is a high-impact role for an early-career candidate who brings strong analytical fundamentals, intellectual curiosity, and a willingness to take initiative.

source_jobs.title: Associate Accountant
source_jobs.description:
Imagine seeing a skyline and knowing you helped build it. At Adi Development Group, that’s not a metaphor — it’s your Monday morning. We’re one of Canada’s most innovative real estate developers with over $3 Billion in built value under development across the GTHA, and we’re looking for people who want their work to literally reshape communities. We move fast, we think like owners, and we don’t settle for “the way it’s always been done.” 
Our culture is built on candour, curiosity and teamwork. Adians challenge each other’s thinking, experiment fearlessly, and show up for one another — whether you’re in your first week or your fifth year. When we make a decision, we commit and move forward together. One team, one mission: build better, for everyone.

source_jobs.title: Associate, Investments
source_jobs.description:
ADI Development Group is a vertically integrated Canadian real estate developer and investment manager based in the Greater Toronto Area. With an established track record across Canadian markets, ADI develops, builds, and manages institutional-quality multi-unit residential communities, with a current focus on affordable rental development at scale. The platform brings development, construction, and property management capabilities together under one roof.

We are seeking an Associate to join the Investments team, with end-to-end responsibility for underwriting, structuring, and execution across the firm's acquisition and development activities. Reporting to the VP of Investments, the Associate will lead financial modeling and diligence on new opportunities, contribute to investment decisions through Investment Committee, and partner with senior leadership on capital formation and lender relationships. The position is intended for a candidate who assumes full ownership of the underwriting function and brings rigor, intellectual curiosity, and disciplined commercial judgment to every transaction.

source_jobs.title: Development Associate - Contract
source_jobs.description:
What if you could help decide where the next great community gets built — and then make it happen?
ADI Development Group is one of Canada's most innovative real estate developers, with over 4,000 units and $3 billion in built value taking shape across the GTHA. But we're not just building homes — we're on an insurgent mission to reinvent the entire customer experience, delivering faster, better, and more cost-effectively than anyone thought possible. As an Adian, you'll shape the communities people call home, create landmarks that endure for generations, and do work that directly changes lives. We champion ownership at every level, move with a bias toward action, and are just as committed to developing tomorrow's leaders as we are to developing land.

source_jobs.title: Senior Accountant
source_jobs.description:
Adi Development Group isn’t your typical developer—we’re one of Canada’s most forward-thinking real estate development, construction management, and investment companies. With 4,000+ units and $3 Billion of built value taking shape across the GTHA, we’re on a mission to completely reimagine how homes are built, delivered, and experienced. 
 
What makes someone thrive here? Curiosity, drive, and a genuine passion for getting better every day. Adians obsess over the customer experience, move fast with a bias toward action, and aren’t afraid to experiment. If you’re energized by trying new approaches and delivering real results, you’ll feel right at home. We face challenges together, we learn together, and we win together.

source_jobs.title: Senior Preconstruction Estimator
source_jobs.description:
ADI Development Group ranks among Canada's most forward-thinking real estate development, construction management, and investment firms. With more than 4,000 units and $3 billion in built value across the GTHA, we're on a bold mission to transform the homebuying experience—delivering better-quality homes faster and more efficiently than anyone else in the market.

The people who thrive at ADI are passionate about their work, decisive by nature, and genuinely committed to growth. We push each other to think differently through honest, respectful dialogue—and when a decision is made, we align and execute as one team. Shared challenge. Shared learning. Shared wins.

We are looking for a seasoned Preconstruction Estimator to join our expanding team. You will take ownership of the full estimating process—from initial feasibility through construction documentation—serving as a key voice in how ADI's projects are structured, designed, and financially positioned. Working alongside internal development, design, and construction teams as well as outside consultants, you'll help ensure every project is economically sound, competitively priced, and set up for precise execution.

If you're an estimator who does your best work in a high-energy, entrepreneurial setting and wants a real seat at the table on major high-rise and mixed-use projects, this is the role for you.

source_jobs.title: Supervisor, Accounts Payable
source_jobs.description:
What if your next move put you at the heart of one of Canada’s most forward-thinking real estate companies? Adi Development Group isn’t your typical developer—we’re a high-growth, insurgent force in real estate development, construction management, and investment across the GTHA. We’re on a mission to completely reimagine how homes are built, delivered, and experienced—and every Adian plays a direct role in making that happen. We champion ownership at every level, and we’re just as committed to developing the leaders of tomorrow as we are to building the communities of today.

 

At Adi, we show up for each other. We share candid feedback, lift each other up, and push one another to be better—whether you’re on your first week or your fifth year. We welcome every perspective and believe the best ideas come from respectful, spirited debate. When a decision is made, we commit fully and move forward as one. We face challenges together. We grow together. We win together.
